name: ableton-agent-system
description: Agentic system for Ableton Live: in-Live kernel (Extensions SDK) + MCP bridge + Claude Code skills. Prototype.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix kernel install && npm --prefix abletonsdk-mcp-server install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm --prefix kernel run build && npm --prefix abletonsdk-mcp-server run build
scripts.test: node kernel/test-action.mjs && cd abletonsdk-mcp-server && node test-mcp.mjs
